keyRules: A maximum of 120 m above ground level (EASA Open Category)
Register as a UAS operator if your drone weighs 250 g or more or is equipped with a camera
A1/A3 online training required – minimum age 16
Mandatory civil liability insurance for drones weighing more than 1.5 kg; The minimum coverage depends on weight—250–1,500 g: €150,000; 1,501–5,000 g: €500,000; >5 kg: €1,000,000
It is prohibited to fly over bridges, railroads, highways, and power lines
Do not fly over assemblies of people. Rules for uninvolved persons depend on subcategory, class mark and operating conditions; check the official matrix.
At least 5 km away from any airport or airfield
Night flight is permitted under the EASA open-category baseline when the required green flashing light is used, unless a current geographic zone or national rule imposes a stricter condition.
The Riga Airport CTR covers a significant area
importantNotes: Insurance depends on the drone's weight — 250–1,500 g: €150,000; 1,501–5,000 g: €500,000; >5 kg: €1,000,000
Flying over bridges, railroads, highways, and power lines is strictly prohibited
The Riga Airport CTR constitutes a large restricted area
There may be additional restrictions in the border areas with Russia and Belarus
The GDPR applies to the filming and photographing of identifiable individuals

fields.disclaimerText: Before your flight, always check the Civil Aviation Agency’s official sources and airspace.lv. This app is a tool—not a legal authority. Latvia complies with EASA regulations, with national additions.
